A young woman with the same unchanged face, pale soft complexion, caught in a classic 90s

disposable-camera snapshot. Her loose black hair falls naturally around her face. She gives a subtle smirk, relaxed and unbothered. She's wearing an oversized faded band T-shirt with a cracked print. The background is a dim beige wall cluttered with polaroids, doodles, and taped-up concert tickets. The harsh on-camera flash creates flat shadows and a raw, nostalgic realism.

The generated image uses the uploaded image as a reference for the character, wearing a high-necked, tight-fitting black long-sleeved dress. A cluster of withered wood and orange-pink flowers lies beside an old newsstand, the grainy texture of vintage film interwoven, the blurred background with noticeable trailing shadows, and the double-image effect creating a fantastical atmosphere. A bewitchingly beautiful girl, carrying flowers, is shown in profile, her fair skin delicate and translucent. Her exquisite face is blurred with motion, the outline of her figure slightly swaying with the panning camera, the soft focus making the image even more hazy and languid. A warm-toned, low-saturation filter enhances the effect, her long, backlit hair glowing with a soft glow, the messy strands sweeping wildly across her jawline, the details concealing a captivating yet dangerous allure. Cute movements add dynamism, the motion blur blending with the film grain, creating a trendy, Instagram-worthy image while the blurred image outlines a dynamic scene full of story, cleverly balancing bewitching and sweetness.

Create a retro, vintage-inspired image — grainy yet bright — based on the reference picture. The girl should be draped in a perfect red, Pinterest-style aesthetic retro saree. The vibe must capture the essence of a 90s movie brown-haired baddie, with wavy curls and a small flower tucked visibly into her hair, enhanced by a windy, romantic atmosphere. She stands against a solid wall, where deep shadows and dramatic contrasts add mystery and artistry to the scene, creating a moody yet enchanting cinematic effect.

A 2160x3840 pixel (4K) Ultra-Realistic Digital Photo Masterpiece Triptych. The image is a vertical canvas divided into three equal horizontal panels. The main subject, whose face must be 100% identical to the reference photo, is a young woman with long, flowing hair and a flat, nostalgic expression, possessing deep, intelligent eyes. Her outfit is a loose winter black puffer set with wide-cut trousers and a black scarf. The overall mood is melancholy and solitude, set in a snow-covered white landscape with a muted color palette.
Panel 1 (Portrait Shot): A medium portrait of the character holding a transparent umbrella, silently looking back while gazing directly into the warm glow of a fire. The background is heavily blurred (bokeh), featuring pine trees, a strong aurora borealis, and deep white snow.
Panel 2 (Full Body Shot): A full-body shot captured from a high, looking-down camera angle. The character stands alone in a vast, open snowfield with scattered pine trees and a few bare, leafless trees. She holds the umbrella, walking while gazing up at the aurora-filled sky, with one hand raised as if catching falling snowflakes in the distance. The scene conveys smallness and isolation against the vastness of nature.
Panel 3 (Close Up Shot): A tight close-up of the character's face, featuring a flat, distant gaze that evokes feelings of loneliness and longing. The background includes pine trees, the soft aurora glow, and visible snowfall.
Technical Specifications: Captured with a Hasselblad X2D 100C camera and a Fujifilm GF 45mm f/2.8 R WR lens (to maintain quality across all perspectives). Soft, dim night lighting is used, with warm contrast from the fire in Panel 1. Focus on the textured puffer material, the soft snow, and the luminous quality of the aurora. Cinematic coloring with a strong emphasis on cold tones and melancholy atmosphere.
Facial Constraint: Crucial: Use the attached photo as the subject reference. Maintain 100% identical facial features: do not alter the appearance of the eyes, hair, nose, lips, front bangs, and face shape from the source photo. The identity must be perfectly preserved across all three panels.

Her face and upper body are painted in a realistic, expressive oil painting style with textured brushstrokes and muted colors. The gallery's clean red wall creates a professional exhibition atmosphere thanks to soft lighting illuminating the artwork. Ultra-realistic cinematic photograph set inside an old Indian police station detention area in New Delhi. The environment is gritty, institutional, and worn-down, with muted greenish-gray concrete walls showing age, stains, and chipped paint. A rectangular black signboard on the back wall clearly reads “Police Station – New Delhi” on the top line and “DETENTION AREA” below it in white capital letters. The room feels dusty, bureaucratic, and tense.
The floor is dull gray concrete, slightly uneven and matte, with subtle scuff marks. On both sides of the frame are old wooden tables with dark brown finishes. These tables are cluttered with stacks of aged brown paper files and folders tied with white string, some files leaning unevenly, others stacked neatly. A few files have faded pink and beige covers, suggesting official case documents. Behind the tables, the background includes metal mesh partitions and barred doors typical of Indian police detention areas.
Lighting is cinematic and moody: overhead fluorescent tube lights cast a soft, diffused, slightly greenish-gray illumination. Shadows are natural and directional, falling gently under the chin, arms, and along the floor. The color palette is restrained and desaturated—olive greens, dull grays, khaki browns, and muted skin tones—creating a realistic, somber atmosphere. No dramatic highlights; the light feels institutional and cold.
In the center foreground, a young Indian woman is being escorted forward.
PRESERVE THE FACE 100% EXACTLY AS THE INPUT IMAGE — identical facial structure, proportions, skin texture, age, expression, jawline, eyes, nose, lips, and identity. Do not beautify, stylize, or alter the face in any way. No smoothing, no symmetry correction, no enhancements.
Her expression is calm and light smirk. Her eyes are looking slightly to the side, not directly at the camera. Dark eyeliner. Lips are relaxed and neutral. Her posture is upright but constrained.
She is wearing a strapless black mini dress, form-fitting with a subtle ruched texture that hugs the body naturally.The fabric appears matte with minimal sheen. She is also wearing knee-high black leather boots, fitted closely around the calves, with a smooth leather texture and flat soles. Her wrists are cuffed together with metallic handcuffs in front of her body, catching a faint reflection from the overhead lights.
Her hair is dark and styled in a slightly messy, loose updo with strands falling naturally around the face and neck—realistic, imperfect, and unstyled rather than glamorous. No heavy accessories, no jewelry, no makeup exaggeration.
To her right, a middle-aged Indian male police officer escorts her forward. He has a serious, stern expression, thick mustache, and short, neatly combed hair. He is wearing a standard khaki Indian police uniform with shoulder insignia, name badge, and small service ribbons on the chest. His uniform is slightly worn but clean, with visible seams, pockets, and creases. He wears a brown leather belt with a metallic buckle. His right hand grips her upper arm firmly but not aggressively, conveying authority and control.
The camera framing is full-body, eye-level, centered, with a cinematic depth of field. Background elements are slightly softened but still clearly readable. The image feels like a still from a serious crime drama or investigative film—realistic, grounded, tense, and narrative-driven.
Style keywords: ultra-realistic, cinematic photography, Indian crime drama aesthetic, documentary realism, high detail, natural skin texture, realistic lighting, shallow depth of field, muted colors, no stylization, no fantasy elements, no glamour. 9:16 image ratio
